title: How to Use NanoClaw (Better Than OpenClaw?)
summary: NanoClaw is a lightweight, AI-native alternative to OpenClaw for building agent swarms. It uses ephemeral Docker containers and Telegram integration to coordinate autonomous agents for tasks like web scraping and research. The framework is designed to be forked and customized directly by AI models like Claude.
